message:
fix(conformance): correct third-party extension capabilities, un-ignore promoted tests

Validated manifest corrections:
- third-party/ogulcancelik-pi-sketch: fix registers_commands false (was
  incorrectly true), remove phantom command registrations (assistant,
  codemap, skill) that don't exist in the actual extension — it only
  registers the apply_patch tool
- Add trailing newline to VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json

Generated conformance tests:
- Un-ignore ext_npm_ogulcancelik_pi_sketch — now tier 1-2 compatible
  after manifest correction
- Un-ignore ext_third_party_ogulcancelik_pi_sketch — same reason
- Un-ignore ext_third_party_kcosr_pi_extensions — promoted to default
  test set after tier validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6604,7 +6604,7 @@
       "source_tier": "third-party-github",
       "capabilities": {
         "registers_tools": true,
-        "registers_commands": true,
+        "registers_commands": false,
         "registers_flags": false,
         "registers_providers": false,
         "subscribes_events": [
@@ -6635,11 +6635,7 @@
         "tools": [
           "apply_patch"
         ],
-        "commands": [
-          "assistant",
-          "codemap",
-          "skill"
-        ],
+        "commands": [],
         "flags": [],
         "event_handlers": [
           "SIGINT",
@@ -7636,4 +7632,4 @@
       }
     }
   ]
-}
\ No newline at end of file
+}
